# FreyaUnits (qbitOS)

FreyaUnits is a browser-native utility surface for precision conversion, scientific calculator workflows, terminal command lanes, and HexCast dither tooling.

## Canonical URLs

- https://freya.qbitos.ai/
- https://freya.qbitos.ai/freya-landing.html
- https://freya.qbitos.ai/freya-units.html
- https://freya.qbitos.ai/freya-terminal.html

## Repository

- https://github.com/qbitOS/qbitos-freya

## CLI Surfaces

- `uv run python tools/freya-math-cli.py`
- `uv run python tools/freya-hexcast-cli.py`
